message:
refactor: Apply DRY to runtime.zig with pyobject_cast helper

- Add pyobject_cast.zig with cast() helper for type-safe casting
- Refactor pyTruthy() to use cast helper (35→15 lines)
- Refactor printPyObjectImpl() to use cast helper
- Extract printUnknownType() and tryPrintStringResult() helpers
- Refactor printList() to reuse printPyObjectImpl() (removed duplicate dispatch)

runtime.zig: 1651 → 1595 lines (56 lines removed through DRY)
Total reduction from original: 2565 → 1595 lines (~38%)
